name: Brand24
description: The Brand24 app in OpenClaw lets marketing and PR teams instantly explore brand mentions, sentiment, and med...
longDescription:
The Brand24 app in OpenClaw lets marketing and PR teams instantly explore brand mentions, sentiment, and media coverage using simple prompts.
Summarize conversations, track brand reputation, analyze trends over time, and uncover key discussion sources across social media, news, blogs, and forums without leaving OpenClaw.

From spotting emerging issues to understanding audience perception and campaign impact, OpenClaw interprets Brand24 data in real time, helping marketers and PR specialists move from monitoring to insight and action with no extra setup.
